name: accounting-legal-chatbot-desktop
description: Accounting & Legal AI Chatbot — Desktop App

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run copy:frontend && electron-packager . "LegalAcct AI" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist-electron --overwrite
scripts.copy:frontend: npx shx mkdir -p frontend/dist && npx shx cp -r ../frontend/dist/* frontend/dist/
